sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ بِنْتٌ اسْمُهَا هَنَاءُ تَعِيشُ قَرِيبًا مِنَ الْغَابَةِ.
sentences.translation: Bila je djevojčica po imenu Hana koja je živjela blizu šume.
sentences.translationEn: There was a girl named Hana who lived near the forest.

sentences.arabic: سَمِعَتْ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ أَصْوَاتَ الطُّيُورِ وَأَحَبَّتْهَا.
sentences.translation: Svaki dan je čula glasove ptica i zavoljela ih.
sentences.translationEn: Every day she heard the sounds of birds and came to love them.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ تَضَعُ الْحُبُوبَ وَالْمَاءَ أَمَامَ الْبَيْتِ لِلطُّيُورِ.
sentences.translation: Stavljala je zrna i vodu ispred kuće za ptice.
sentences.translationEn: She would put grains and water in front of the house for the birds.

sentences.arabic: جَاءَتِ الطُّيُورُ كُلَّ صَبَاحٍ وَغَنَّتْ لَهَا.
sentences.translation: Ptice su dolazile svako jutro i pjevale joj.
sentences.translationEn: The birds came every morning and sang for her.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ ذَلِكَ أَحَبَّ شَيْءٍ فِي يَوْمِهَا.
sentences.translation: To je bila njena omiljena stvar u toku dana.
sentences.translationEn: That was the most beloved thing in her day.
